commands.summary: Renderer TypeScript build and browser bundle passed after introducing Decisions, People, Agents, and Channels navigation.
25 renderer interaction tests passed, covering the new decision-first route, People directory, Channels drill-in for messages/calls/signals, and existing message/agent workflows.

environment.process_note: OCX-001: primary desktop IA is now Decisions, People, Agents, Channels, with Messages still accessible through Channels.
